overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment with distinctive orange sidewalks and neon signage. The character navigates past a restaurant row, crosses a busy intersection with heavy traffic, and continues along a street toward a colorful elevated pedestrian bridge.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk past a restaurant with outdoor seating and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: man in gray suit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: raised concrete platform with metal railings and outdoor furniture
bright illuminated advertisements and menu boards on building facade
distinctive orange textured metal walkway surface
tropical palm trees lining the street median
large concrete overpass with support beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a distinctive orange sidewalk in a futuristic city. A restaurant with outdoor seating and bright neon signs occupies the right side, while palm trees and an elevated highway structure are visible in the distance on the left. The character walks past a pedestrian ahead while cars move along the street.

events.description: scene cuts to a different street section featuring a large concrete wall on the right and approaching crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward a crosswalk with increasing pedestrian activity ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large plain gray concrete wall with small rectangular windows
tall yellow traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing lights
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
elevated walkway with rainbow-colored glass panels and steel structure

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the scene shifts to a sidewalk bordered by a massive concrete wall on the right. The character walks toward a crosswalk with a colorful pedestrian bridge visible in the distance. A woman in white walks ahead toward the intersection, and the traffic light pole becomes prominent on the right.

events.description: pedestrian signal turns green and group begins crossing the street together
blue six-wheeled vintage car drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the crosswalk with a group of pedestrians while monitoring passing traffic

notable_agents.action: blue six-wheeled car driving through the intersection
group of four pedestrians crossing in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped road markings for pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians. A distinctive blue six-wheeled car drives past on the left. The concrete building wall is now across the street on the right, and the pedestrian bridge remains visible ahead. The traffic light shows green for walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along industrial wall approaching pedestrian bridge

events.description: passing a building entrance with concrete ramp and yellow-black caution stripes

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk next to the large concrete wall, approaching the colorful pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: person with spiky hair and casual clothing walking toward camera

entered.detail: concrete accessibility ramp with yellow and black hazard stripes leading to building entrance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the sidewalk with the large concrete wall immediately on the right. The colorful pedestrian bridge grows larger in the frame as the character approaches it. The character passes a building entrance with a ramp and encounters a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. Traffic continues to flow on the left side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, moving from a vibrant restaurant row toward a colorful elevated pedestrian bridge. It begins by walking along a distinctive orange sidewalk past neon-lit outdoor seating and palm trees, before the environment shifts as the camera approaches a massive concrete wall. As the character reaches a busy intersection, the scene opens up to a wide crosswalk where a blue six-wheeled car drives past amidst a crowd of pedestrians. The camera then continues forward, passing a building entrance with a ramp while the concrete wall remains a constant presence on the right. Finally, the perspective advances along the sidewalk as the colorful pedestrian bridge grows larger and more prominent in the frame.
